name: Digital Consumer Electronics and Information Technology — Staff Observations
description: Internal Aberdeen memo on the Digital Consumer Electronics and Information Technology (DCEIT) sector at a Q2-2002 inflection: Intel's $400M revenue shortfall, aggressive CPU price cuts, and AMD's 22% share gains driving PC OEM repositioning. Documents retail observations from Caroline Kastner's tracking research and catalogs vendor-specific line moves at Gateway and Dell ahead of the 2002 back-to-school season.
